---
title: "Royal Hampshire Hospital, The"
---

## Royal Hampshire Hospital, The

**Type:** organization

### About

CMY refers (10 January 1872) to the publication of Edward Faithfull’s poems as likely to add to its funds.  Many of her friends were involved with fundraising for its construction and she herself was a subscriber.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
